column1: # experiment_matrix.tsv -- every run to execute on ARCC.
# STRICT FORMAT: exactly 7 TAB-separated fields per row. No alignment tabs.
# (submit_all.sh parses with IFS=tab; extra tabs create empty fields and shift columns.)
# Columns: exp_id  encoder  mode  dataset  seeds  status  notes
# status: DONE=have it | DONE_LOCAL=already finished on the local 4080, do NOT
#         resubmit | PARTIAL=some folds done locally, submit to finish |
#         READY=code exists, run on ARCC | OPTIONAL=nice-to-have
